scene_title: Iluminura da Besta enganadora com mascaras
narrative_beat: Figura bestial com lingua longa e duas mascaras

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval illuminated Revelation manuscript page showing deceptive beast figure with long tongue holding two different masks surrounded by golden crimson flames and believable followers in detailed rich colors in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the deceptive beast holding two different masks with long tongue
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated corporate meeting room with dark presentation screen in background
props: medieval beast figure with long tongue

environment.location: medieval illumination meets corporate meeting room

composition.foreground: beast and masks in vivid gold crimson

mood.emotion: the image already exists, already operates, already deceives

symbolism.primary: medieval art accurately predicting Silicon Valley's business model
symbolism.secondary: two masks as two faces — empathetic AI and surveillance AI

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
